# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: serverauthnz
---  
apiVersion: authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ResourceAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  namespace: default
spec:
  resources: ["services"] # This will allow all services in the "default" Namespace to access ServerAuthNZ ServiceAccount permissions  
---   
apiVersion: authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ResourceAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  namespace: default
spec:
  resources: ["pods"] # This will allow all pods in the "default" Namespace to access ServerAuthNZ ServiceAccount permissions  
---   
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-authz
data:
  config.yaml: |
    api_version: authorization/v1beta1
    kind: ResourceAuthorizationPolicy
    metadata:
      namespace: default  
    spec:    
      resources: ["services"] # This will allow all services in the "default" Namespace to access ServerAuthNZ ServiceAccount permissions 
---      
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-authz2
data:  
    config.yaml: |    
      api_version: authorization/v1beta1
      kind: ResourceAuthorizationPolicy
      metadata:
        namespace: default      
      spec:        
          resources: ["pods"] # This will allow all pods in the "default" Namespace to access ServerAuthNZ ServiceAccount permissions
